SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem

Class CommentItem

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.CommentItem
public class CommentItem extends Object
Represents a comment posted on an event.

This model supports threaded discussions by storing the parent comment ID, nesting depth, aggregate vote score, and soft-delete state.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    CommentItem(String commentId, String uid, String username, String text, Date createdAt, String parentCommentId, int depth, int score, boolean deleted)
    Creates a comment item.

  • Constructor Details

    • CommentItem

      public CommentItem(String commentId, String uid, String username, String text, Date createdAt, String parentCommentId, int depth, int score, boolean deleted)
      Creates a comment item.
      Parameters:
      commentId - the Firestore document ID for the comment
      uid - the user ID of the comment author
      username - the display name shown with the comment
      text - the stored comment text
      createdAt - the timestamp when the comment was created
      parentCommentId - the parent comment ID, or an empty string for top-level comments
      depth - the nesting depth of the comment
      score - the total vote score for the comment
      deleted - whether the comment has been soft-deleted

  • Method Details

    • getCommentId

      public String getCommentId()
      Returns the comment document ID.
      Returns:
      the comment ID

    • getUid

      public String getUid()
      Returns the author user ID.
      Returns:
      the author UID

    • getUsername

      public String getUsername()
      Returns the display name shown for the comment author.
      Returns:
      the comment author name

    • getText

      public String getText()
      Returns the display text for the comment.

      If the comment was soft-deleted, this returns [deleted].

      Returns:
      the display text

    • getRawText

      public String getRawText()
      Returns the original stored text.
      Returns:
      the raw comment text

    • getCreatedAt

      public Date getCreatedAt()
      Returns the creation timestamp.
      Returns:
      the comment creation time, or null if unavailable

    • getParentCommentId

      public String getParentCommentId()
      Returns the parent comment ID.
      Returns:
      the parent comment ID, or an empty string for top-level comments

    • getDepth

      public int getDepth()
      Returns the nesting depth of the comment.
      Returns:
      the thread depth

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      Returns the aggregate vote score.
      Returns:
      the comment score

    • isDeleted

      public boolean isDeleted()
      Returns whether the comment has been soft-deleted.
      Returns:
      true if deleted, otherwise false

    • isTopLevel

      public boolean isTopLevel()
      Returns whether the comment is a top-level comment.
      Returns:
      true if the comment has no parent, otherwise false
